title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
